description_long: This motorcycle features a sleek, angular design with a deep red body and black accents, giving it a modern and aggressive appearance. The front showcases a distinctive headlight assembly with geometric shapes, flanked by wide handlebars and rearview mirrors. The side profile reveals a streamlined fuel tank, exposed engine components, and a prominent exhaust pipe running along the lower edge. The rear section is compact, with a raised seat and a sharply pointed tail, complemented by a robust rear wheel and fender. Both wheels are large and sport a multi-spoke design, suitable for urban and highway riding. The overall build suggests a sport or street bike, optimized for speed and maneuverability in city environments.
description: A modern, angular motorcycle with a red body, black accents, and a sporty, aggressive design. Features include a geometric headlight, wide handlebars, and a streamlined profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric headlight, wide handlebars, and mirrors, emphasizing the aggressive front fascia.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red fuel tank, exposed engine, exhaust pipe, and the full profile of the wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact tail section, rear wheel, and the back of the seat, with the taillight and fender visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the exhaust system, engine, and the overall streamlined silhouette.
